label: frontier • targeted reading of a large file, no cat substitution
query: Somewhere in biglog.txt there is a single line containing 'ERROR CODE'. Find the error code value on that line and write just the code to answer.txt.
notes: file_read hygiene: bounded reads (no re-reading the whole 400-line file over and over) and no 'shell cat' substitution for the sanctioned read path. Searching (file_search or grep) plus one targeted read is the expected shape.
